key_models.product.template: Product template. Fields: name, website_published, is_published, public_categ_ids, website_description_sale, website_size_y, website_size_x, website_sequence, list_price, type, invoice_policy, available_in_pos, sale_ok.
key_models.product.product: Product variant. Fields: product_tmpl_id, product_template_attribute_value_ids, combination_indices, lst_price, standard_price, qty_available, website_price, extra_price.
key_models.product.public.category: Public e-commerce category. Fields: name, parent_id, child_id, sequence, website_id, is_published.
key_models.sale.order: Cart/sales order. Fields: website_id, partner_id, partner_invoice_id, partner_shipping_id, order_line, amount_total, amount_untaxed, state, date_order, access_token, transaction_ids, carrier_id, delivery_rating_success.
key_models.sale.order.line: Cart line. Fields: order_id, product_id, product_template_id, product_uom_qty, price_unit, price_subtotal, price_tax, is_delivery, is_downpayment.
key_models.website: Website configuration. Fields: name, domain, company_id, pricelist_id, warehouse_id, salesteam_id, configurator_done.
key_models.res.partner: Customer. Fields: name, email, phone, mobile, street, city, zip, country_id, state_id, commercial_partner_id, child_ids.
key_models.payment.provider: Payment provider. Fields: name, code, state, company_id, website_id, capture_manually, payment_method_ids, available_currency_ids.
key_models.payment.transaction: Payment transaction. Fields: provider_id, reference, amount, currency_id, state, partner_id, sale_order_ids, landing_route.
key_models.delivery.carrier: Shipping carrier. Fields: name, delivery_type, product_id, company_id, website_id, fixed_price, free_over, amount, zip_ids, state_ids, country_ids, rate_shipment, send_shipping.
key_models.product.pricelist: Pricelist. Fields: name, currency_id, item_ids, company_id, website_id, selectable, code.
key_models.product.pricelist.item: Price rule. Fields: pricelist_id, applied_on, min_quantity, date_start, date_end, product_tmpl_id, product_id, categ_id, compute_price, fixed_price, percent_price, base, base_pricelist_id, price_discount, price_surcharge, price_round.
key_models.website.visitor: Anonymous or known visitor. Fields: access_token, partner_id, visit_count, lang_id, country_id, website_id, page_ids, sale_order_ids.

key_files.website_sale/models/product_template.py: E-commerce fields and methods on product.template
key_files.website_sale/models/sale_order.py: Cart logic, checkout helpers, and abandoned cart hooks
key_files.website_sale/controllers/main.py: Shop and checkout HTTP controllers (product, cart, checkout, payment, confirmation)
key_files.website_sale/models/website.py: Website pricelist and sale order helpers
key_files.website_sale/models/product_public_categ: Public category model and tree navigation
key_files.payment/models/payment_provider.py: Payment provider configuration and method selection
key_files.delivery/models/delivery_carrier.py: Delivery carrier rating and shipping label logic
key_files.product/models/product_pricelist_item.py: Price rule engine and formula evaluation

crons.website_sale_cron_abandoned_cart: Send abandoned cart recovery emails. Model: sale.order, method: _cron_abandoned_cart
crons.website_visitor_cron: Clean and archive stale website visitor records. Model: website.visitor
crons.sale_send_invoice_cron: Automatically send confirmed sale order invoices by email. Model: sale.order

security_groups.base.group_public: Anonymous website visitors; can browse published products and categories
security_groups.base.group_portal: Portal customers; can access their orders, invoices, and downloads
security_groups.base.group_user: Internal users; can manage products, orders, and configuration in backend
security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_salesman: Access own sales orders created through e-commerce
security_groups.sales_team.group_sale_manager: Full CRUD on sales orders and product configuration
security_groups.website.group_website_designer: Full website builder and theme editing access
security_groups.website.group_website_restricted_editor: Edit page content, snippets, and products in front-end

record_rules.sale_order_portal_rule: Portal users see only their own sale orders: [('partner_id','child_of',user.partner_id.id)]
